differences: Shopping, cooking, recipe names, dates, counts, and placeholder artwork use MVP fixture data rather than literal prototype fixture data.
SHOPPING_DETAIL preserves MVP reorder/read-only affordances and completed-list behavior.
Pantry reflect picker opens before completion is committed, so the backdrop remains in-progress by contract.
suggestions: Keep the current UI implementation unchanged for Phase5 unless current-head CI screenshots reveal a new layout drift.
Preserve completed-list read-only behavior, exclude/uncheck semantics, and pantry reflection null/empty/selected payload behavior.
Use the new 320px pantry reflect picker capture in future authority checks.
reasoning: Slice D current service captures match the fixed Wave1 mobile references across shopping flow, shopping detail, pantry reflect picker, cook ready list, cook mode, and consumed ingredient checklist. Remaining differences are classified as MVP functional-contract preservation or browser rendering limits, with visual blockers 0 and unclassified visual differences 0.
